CustomObject.label: NEPA Agency Endpoint
CustomObject.description: Registry of federal agency NEPA REST API endpoints. Each record defines one agency — add a new record to add a new agency without modifying code. The DeveloperName must match nepa_agency_endpoint_ref__c on nepa_required_permit__c records.

fields.label: Agency Key
fields.description: Short agency abbreviation matching nepa_agency_endpoint_ref__c (e.g., USACE, USFWS, BLM). Must be unique across records.

fields.label: Named Credential
fields.description: API name of the Named Credential used to authenticate to this agency's NEPA REST API (e.g., NEPA_Agency_USACE). All public endpoints use NoAuthentication credentials.

fields.label: Process Endpoint Path
fields.description: URL path appended to the Named Credential base URL, with trailing slash. The federal_unique_id is appended at runtime. Example: /services/apexrest/nepa/v1/processes/

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: When false, this agency is skipped by NepaAgencyPermitService. Use to disable an endpoint without deleting the record.
